items.scenario: You recently joined the campus astronomy club and signed up for its overnight observation event at the Crestmoor Observatory next Saturday. The organizers sent a basic confirmation, but several logistical details about transportation, equipment, and dinner arrangements remain unclear.
items.direction: Write an email to Mr. Lansing. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you need clarification on the event details
Ask about the transportation and equipment arrangements
Describe what would help you prepare for the observation night
items.subject: Logistical details for Saturday's observatory trip

items.scenario: You are a senior linguistics major applying to graduate programs this fall. You took a syntax seminar with your professor last spring and earned an A, but you have not spoken with her since the course ended and need to ask about a recommendation letter.
items.direction: Write an email to Professor Halverson. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain the recommendation letter you need
Provide details about the programs and their deadlines
Ask whether a brief meeting would be helpful
items.subject: Graduate school recommendation request

items.scenario: You have lived in Briarwood Tower for six months, and the third-floor laundry room has been out of service for the past two weeks. Posted notices keep promising repairs by Friday but no technician has arrived. Meanwhile, the basement laundry room has long waits every evening.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Caldwell. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain how the delay has affected residents
Ask for a definite repair timeline
items.subject: Third-floor laundry room repair update

items.scenario: You volunteer twice a month at the Linden Park branch library, helping run the children's reading hour on Saturday mornings. The library recently moved its volunteer scheduling to an online portal, and several conflicts have appeared on your assigned dates.
items.direction: Write an email to Ms. Hartigan. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the conflicts on the new volunteer portal
Ask how to adjust your assigned dates
items.subject: Conflicts on the new volunteer portal
